ssl/SSLSocket/unwrap.name: unwrap
ssl/SSLSocket/unwrap.description: Performs the SSL shutdown handshake, which removes the TLS layer from the underlying socket, and returns the underlying socket object. This can be used to go from encrypted operation over a connection to unencrypted. The returned socket should always be used for further communication with the other side of the connection, rather than the original socket.
